name: combobox-dropdown-menu
visual_summary: The combobox-dropdown-menu is a dropdown list component that allows users to select an option from a predefined list. It is typically used in forms, settings, or filter selections. This component is often used for user convenience and ease of use.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready combobox-dropdown-menu component with the following characteristics:

Name: combobox-dropdown-menu
Description: The combobox-dropdown-menu is a dropdown list component that allows users to select an option from a predefined list. It is typically used in forms, settings, or filter selections. This component is often used for user convenience and ease of use.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. hover, focus, keyboard navigable
Tags: form, settings, filter, dropdown, list, selection

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
